CustomField.description: for timestamping when EBX has received updates on Contact to MDM fields New: MG 2022.10.18 revised field label/API name from "LastModified_EBXScopeContact" to "LastModified_EBXScope / LastModified_EBXScope__c" New: MG 2023.01.30 removed NOW() default - logic is in updated L.FLOW 2202 Contact After General
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This TimeStamp field reflects EBX update based on MDM fields being updated on Contact
CustomField.label: LastModified_EBXScope
